segments.en: As you know, this will be a joint fourth and fifth grade trip to Mount Oakley.
segments.zh: 正如你们所知，这将是一次四年级和五年级的联合旅行，目的地是橡树山。

segments.en: Buses will be parked outside the school entrance and will depart at 8 a.m. sharp.
segments.zh: 公交车将停在学校入口外，将于上午8点准时出发。

segments.en: The student should go directly to their bus without entering the school.
segments.zh: 学生应该直接去他们的公交车，不进入学校。

segments.en: Fourth graders will use bus 1 and fifth graders should board bus 2.
segments.zh: 四年级学生乘坐1号车，五年级学生乘坐2号车。

segments.en: The exception is Ms Klein's class, which has volunteered to help load supplies into a van that will follow the buses.
segments.zh: 克莱因女士的班级是例外，他们自愿帮忙将物资装上一辆跟随公交车的小货车。

segments.en: These students should meet in the gym at 7.30.
segments.zh: 这些学生应该在7:30到体育馆集合。

segments.en: Note that students who arrive after 8 will have to be driven privately to the destination by a parent or guardian.
segments.zh: 请注意，8点之后到达的学生必须由家长或监护人亲自开车送到目的地。

segments.en: Now mark your answer on your answer sheet.
segments.zh: 现在请在答题纸上标记答案。
